query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as fake_count
FROM trialSignups
WHERE 
  email LIKE '%@example.com'
  OR email LIKE '%test%@%'
  OR phone LIKE '555-%'
  OR phone LIKE '555%'
  OR name LIKE 'Test %'
  OR name LIKE '% Test'
  OR name = 'Jane Doe'
  OR name = 'John Doe'
  OR name = 'Sarah Johnson'
  OR (email LIKE '%manus%' AND email LIKE '%test%');
